extracted.name: Firecrawl
extracted.oneLiner: The context API to search, scrape, and interact with the web at scale.
extracted.tagline: Power AI agents with clean web data
features: Search the web and get full content from results
Scrape clean, structured data from any page including markdown, JSON, screenshots
Interact with web pages using AI prompts or code (click, scroll, type, navigate)
Agent-ready for autonomous data gathering
JavaScript rendering and smart wait for dynamic content
Media parsing including PDFs, DOCX, spreadsheets
Advanced web coverage including JS-heavy pages
Token-efficient output optimized for LLMs
Open source with large community and SDKs for multiple languages
Browser sandbox for secure, managed interactive sessions
Parallel agents for batch processing at scale
Zero configuration, handles proxies, rendering, and complex sites automatically
extracted.positioning: Firecrawl is positioned as a comprehensive, developer-first infrastructure layer that enables AI systems and developers to reliably search, scrape, and interact with live web data at scale. It is ideal for AI companies and teams building applications that require clean, structured, and up-to-date web data, including deep research agents, RAG pipelines, lead enrichment, competitive intelligence, and AI-powered chatbots. Firecrawl differentiates itself by combining search, scrape, and interact capabilities with high reliability, speed, token efficiency, and open-source transparency, making it a best-in-class solution for powering AI agents and applications with live web context.

extracted.positioning: Oxylabs positions itself as a premium, reliable, and scalable proxy and web scraping platform designed to serve a wide range of use cases including AI training, e-commerce, marketing intelligence, cybersecurity, and custom data workflows. It emphasizes high-quality, ethically sourced IPs, advanced AI-powered tools, and comprehensive support to enable businesses and developers to access public data efficiently and at scale. The platform targets enterprises and professionals needing robust, maintenance-free scraping solutions with flexible pricing and extensive integrations.

extracted.name: Web Scraper
extracted.oneLiner: Powerful web scraper for regular and professional use with point-and-click interface and cloud automation.
features: Point-and-click interface with no coding required
Extract data from dynamic and multi-level navigation websites
Handle JavaScript sites with full JS execution and Ajax waiting
Customize data extraction using sitemaps
Export data in CSV, XLSX, and JSON formats
Cloud scraping with scheduler, API, proxy support, and parser
Integrations with Dropbox, Google Cloud, Google Drive, Google Sheets, Microsoft Azure, Amazon S3
Captcha and bot protection bypass with automatic retries
Free browser extension for local use
Cloud subscription plans for automated scraping and data management
extracted.positioning: Web Scraper is positioned as a versatile and powerful web scraping tool suitable for both regular users and professionals who need to extract large amounts of data efficiently. It offers an easy-to-use interface combined with advanced cloud features for automation, integration, and overcoming anti-scraping measures. It targets users who want to automate data extraction without coding, scale scraping operations, and integrate data into various systems.
